name: Southern Silver Exploration Corp.
description: Southern Silver Exploration Corp. is a junior exploration company focused on the discovery of world-class silver-polymetallic mineral deposits, with its flagship Cerro Las Minitas project comprising 27,451 hectares in Durango State, Mexico. The company explores for silver, gold, copper, lead, and zinc, and was ranked 28th on the 2026 TSX Venture 50 following a 284% share price increase in 2025. Southern Silver is an exploration-stage company advancing Cerro Las Minitas toward a resource estimate and development decision.
